series_metadata.series_title: Waivers for case-load ratios and classroom size
series_metadata.series_description: Educational agency requests and documentation to waive special education classroom and educator case load ratio work requirements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper in operating area until imaged and indexed. Once confirmed the paper copy has been checked for accuracy, quality, and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain the electronic record for three (3) years; then delete, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
